amplification_gate.discrimination_proven: selftest on synthetic operators reports CONTRACTIVE at gain 0.6 (min amp 0.61) and EXPANSIVE at gain 1.6 (min amp 1.47); the discrimination GLM-5.2's residual stream could not offer

apparatus_resolved.primitive_parity: MoE organ (rmsnorm, router, SwiGLU) validated vs official transformers reference to float tolerance; DEEPSEEK_V4_PRIMITIVE_PARITY.json
apparatus_resolved.real_pre_moe_hidden: produced for layer 5; the embedding-seeded confound is removed
apparatus_resolved.streamed_forward: tools/condense/deepseek_v4_reference.py - official DeepseekV4DecoderLayer, real dequantized weights, one block resident at a time; all 3 attention types run to finite output
apparatus_resolved.wall_withdrawn: REFERENCE_FORWARD_UNAVAILABLE is withdrawn; the forward is available and validated by construction. What remained was compute time, now spending.

blocked_on: nothing structural; the contextual existence test and the amplification probe are compute-bound runs on the validated forward
gate_order_changed: the perturbation amplification gate decides whether propagation-dependent work and the rate ladder run at all; nothing is promoted from a local fit

moe_probe_result.verdict: functional escape does not reproduce from embedding-seeded input; loses to a constant

not_evidence_of: capability; the harness has only been exercised on a synthetic teacher
protocol: 4 weight-space control (constant, standing in for the closed families)
7 perturbation amplification at multiple magnitudes (THE GATE)
10 exact 0.75/0.50/0.333 artifacts only if the functional direction survives propagation
source_precision_note: experts are already fp4, so a 1.0 complete-BPW target is a ~4x reduction here, not the ~16x a BF16 parent implies; the byte accounting must carry the source-format caveat
